sigWerErrors.reason: 'Anna' and 'Al' are different names; this changes the subject of the sentence and could cause confusion about who is being addressed.
'ocak' (January) is replaced with 'Ocak-Aralık' (January-December), which changes the requested date range from a single month to the entire year, significantly altering the meaning.
The word 'aralık' (December) is omitted, which further changes the requested date range and contributes to misunderstanding the request.
